name: Mah Ki Dal (Whole Black Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the dal, then add it to boiling water.
2. Add turmeric, salt, finely chopped ginger (half of it), and garlic; cook on medium heat for 2-3 hours, or pressure cook at 15lb for 30 minutes.
3. Uncover, continue cooking in the same pan over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally until a creamy consistency is reached.
4. Heat ghee, add remaining ginger, stir, then add sliced onions and chili; fry until golden brown.
5. Add cumin or coriander (optional); pour over dal just before serving.
